title: Pan Seared Greek Sea Bass Pastitsio
description: A buttery and velvety Greek dish featuring sea bass, made in a pastitsio form and cooked to perfection in a papillote, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the sea bass fillets with salt and black pepper
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly
Add the butter and stir until melted
Place a sea bass fillet in the center of a piece of parchment paper, spoon some of the tomato mixture over the fish, and fold the paper to create a papillote
Repeat with the remaining fillets and place the papillotes on a baking sheet
Bake for 12 minutes or until the fish is cooked through
Serve the sea bass pastitsio hot, garnished with chopped parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice
